title: lotus corniculatus f. crassifolius
intro: Lotus corniculatus f. crassifolius, also known as the broad-leaved birdsfoot trefoil, is a variant of the bird's-foot trefoil plant (Lotus corniculatus) characterized by broader leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to help reduce symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lotus corniculatus f. crassifolius is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
